remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Dataiku named a Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for 5th consecutive year
remarks.content: For the fifth consecutive year, Dataiku has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for AI Platforms for Data Science and Machine Learning, once again recognized in the Leader quadrant for both “Completeness of Vision” and “Ability to Execute.”
remarks.contentTranslation: Dataiku连续第五年被评为2026年Gartner ®数据科学和机器学习AI平台魔力象限™的领导者，再次在“愿景的完整性”和“执行能力”的领导者象限中获得认可。
remarks.translation: Dataiku连续第五年被评为Gartner魔力象限领导者
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: AI explainability in finance: auditable models, GenAI, and agents
remarks.content: Regulators are asking financial institutions a direct question: Can you explain how your AI made that decision? For most, the honest answer is no — not fully, not on demand, and not across every system that now influences regulated decisions. Compliance functions are expected to cover
remarks.contentTranslation: 监管机构正在向金融机构提出一个直接的问题：你能解释一下你的AI是如何做出这个决定的吗？对于大多数人来说，诚实的答案是否定的—不是完全的，不是按需提供的，也不是每个现在影响受监管决策的系统。合规职能预计将涵盖
remarks.translation: 财务中的AI可解释性：可审计模型、GenAI和Agent商
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text: Agentic AI tools in 2026: what to look for when choosing an enterprise-grade solution
remarks.content: Most vendors claim their agentic AI platform is enterprise-grade. In a market where the term has lost almost all meaning, the real test is not the demo. It is what happens after, when agents meet real data, real governance requirements, and the organizational complexity that no sandbox c

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
Good post on the dynamics of AI pricing right now. We’re basically going to see a barbell dynamic on pricing between high cost frontier models and cheap but good open or closed weights models. 

Then the question is how do you maximize efficiency from the frontier models, and get better quality and performance of the cheaper models. That’s where the applied AI layer comes in.

The applied layer can route to the best model at any time given the workload at hand, as well as mitigate either high token costs or worse performance. The closer you are to the underlying workflow, the better you can tune the use of models for a given business process. 

That’s all about understanding the workflows, domain specific FDEs, evals by customer or process, getting data setup well for agents, and more. Overall good for applied AI.
remarks.translation:
关于AI定价动态的好文章。我们基本上会看到高成本前沿模型和廉价但良好的开放式或封闭式权重模型之间的定价动态。那么问题是，如何最大限度地提高前沿模型的效率，并获得更便宜模型的更好质量和性能。这就是应用的AI层的用武之地。
根据手头的工作负载，应用层可以随时路由到最佳模型，并减轻高代币成本或更差的性能。您越接近底层工作流，就越能更好地调整给定业务流程的模型使用方式。这一切都与了解工作流、特定领域的FDE、客户或流程的撤销、为客服代表妥善设置数据等有关。总体上适用于应用的AI。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Swyx
remarks.role: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
remarks.text:
btw Zai IPO'ed in Jan at HK$120 a share. when I first met  @louszbd nobody really knew anyone using GLM's.

now they have beat deepseek with the world's undisputed top open model and in some respects (see @ml_angelopoulos) say top model period, and are returning to SF @aidotengineer on top of the world and open for business!

excited for @Thom_Wolf and @ZixuanLi_ to chat onstage!
remarks.translation: 顺便说一句， Zai在1月份以每股120港元的价格进行了首次公开募股。当我第一次见到@ louszbd时，没有人真正认识任何使用GLM的人。现在，他们已经用世界上无可争议的顶级开放模式击败了deepseek ，在某些方面（见@ ml_angelopoulos ）说了顶级模特时期，并回到SF @ aidotengineer的世界之巅，开始营业！很高兴@ Thom_Wolf和@ ZixuanLi_在舞台上聊天！
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Andrej Karpathy
remarks.role: I like training large deep neural nets.
remarks.text:
This is a new paradigm for interacting with Claude that is significantly more "inline" with all the other human activity org-wide. Once you do all of the under the hood engineering work to make this "just work" (e.g. across tools, integrations, compute environments, memory, security, etc.), Claude basically joins the team in a seamless way - you can talk to it as you would talk to a person and it can help with a very large variety of workloads.

Imo this is the 3rd major redesign of LLM UIUX. The first paradigm was that the LLM is a website you go to, the second was that it is an app you download to your computer. This third one is that it is a self-contained, persistent, asynchronous entity with org-wide tools and context, working alongside teams of humans. It really takes a while to wrap your head around it, but it works and it is awesome.
remarks.translation:
这是一种与克劳德互动的新范式，与组织范围内的所有其他人类活动显着“内联”。一旦你完成了所有的底层工程工作，就可以使其“正常工作” （例如，跨工具、集成、计算环境、内存、安全性等）。） ， Claude基本上以无缝的方式加入团队-您可以像与人交谈一样与之交谈，它可以帮助处理各种各样的工作负载。
IMO这是LLM UIUX的第三次重大重新设计。第一个范例是，法学硕士是您访问的网站，第二个范例是，它是您下载到计算机的应用程序。第三个是，它是一个独立的、持久的、异步的实体，具有组织范围的工具和上下文，与人类团队一起工作。它真的需要一段时间来包裹你的头,但它的工作原理,它是真棒。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
Introducing Plug That Shop 🔌

So @Shopify launched their UCP CLI that allows all the products on their stores available via the command line.

I was thinking of interesting use cases for the CLI over the weekend and realized that I can use this to create contextual embedded shops for websites.

So now, you can enter your website and get four HIGHLY relevant shops that you can embed in just one click.

For the buyer using this shop, it's an insanely simple experience since they can click buy and checkout with Shop in literally one click.

Available, free to use, NO affiliate revenue at plugthatshop dot com

Feedback welcome!
remarks.translation:
Plug That Shop简介🔌因此， @ Shopify推出了其UCP CLI ，允许其商店中的所有产品通过命令行提供。上周末，我在思考CLI的有趣用例，并意识到我可以用它来为网站创建情境嵌入式商店。因此，现在，您可以进入您的网站，只需点击一下即可嵌入四家高度相关的商店。
对于使用这家商店的买家来说，这是一个非常简单的体验，因为他们可以点击“购买” ，然后一键通过“商店”结账。可免费使用， plugthatshop dot com没有会员收入欢迎反馈！

remarks.name: Boris Cherny
remarks.role: Claude Code anthropicai
remarks.text: Tag Claude in a channel, it spins up an instance with its own sandbox. It clones repos, writes code, tests, compiles all in that isolated environment and the sandbox gets thrown away when it's done. One instance per thread, its own memory and permissions per channel.
remarks.translation: 在频道中标记Claude ，它使用自己的沙箱旋转实例。它克隆存储库，编写代码，测试，编译所有这些都在那个隔离的环境中，完成后沙箱就会被抛弃。每个线程一个实例，它自己的内存和每个通道的权限。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Boris Cherny
remarks.role: Claude Code anthropicai
remarks.text:
I also have Claude monitoring Slack channels to proactively respond to people to answer their questions and draft PRs, and to react with specific emojis like ✅❌ when a thread is resolved.

To set it up, just add @.Claude to a channel and ask it to do this^, in natural language.
remarks.translation: 我还让Claude监控Slack渠道，主动回复人们的问题和起草公关，并用特定的表情符号做出反应，比如✅❌当线程解决时。要设置它，只需将@ .Claude添加到频道，并要求它用自然语言执行此操作^。

remarks.name: Madhu Guru
remarks.role: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.
remarks.text:
I’ve had the chance to see this ecosystem from the different sides - enterprises, agent startups, data providers, labs. 

The core tension here is that the business models, moats, value exchange, execution playbooks for all players are being figured out in real time.

This debate around token pricing is really a debate over where value will accrue - models, application layer, distribution or other layers.

Expect a lot of strong opinions from the different sides to shape the narrative in their favor.
remarks.translation:
我有机会从不同的角度看到这个生态系统--企业、Agent初创公司、数据提供商、实验室。这里的核心紧张局势是，所有参与者的商业模式、护城河、价值交换、执行剧本都是实时制定的。这场关于代币定价的辩论实际上是一场关于价值在哪里积累的辩论--模型、应用层、分销或其他层。
期待来自不同方面的许多强烈意见，以形成对他们有利的叙述。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text: Dropbox should really support larger than 3TB plans - it's not 2015 anymore. The amount of data we are throwing off and that is *actually usable* is going to go exponential from AI, and Dropbox will be run over by this if they don't update for the future.
remarks.translation: Dropbox真的应该支持大于3TB的计划--现在已经不是2015年了。我们抛出的数据量，即“实际可用”的数据量，将从AI中呈指数级增长，如果他们未来不进行更新， Dropbox将被碾压。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Simon Willison's Blog
remarks.role: AI coding tools, LLM release notes, prompt engineering, datasette ecosystem, developer workflow observations.
remarks.text: sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 adds migrations and nested transactions
remarks.content: sqlite-utils is my combined Python library and CLI tool for working with SQLite databases. It provides an extensive set of higher-level operations on top of Python's default sqlite3
remarks.contentTranslation: sqlite-utils是我结合使用SQLite数据库的Python库和CLI工具。它在Python的默认sqlite3之上提供了一组广泛的高级操作
remarks.translation: sqlite-utils 4.0rc1添加迁移和嵌套事务
